pageContext.name: The Pawn Shop Cabinet
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Star Ace are proud to present The Cabinet Accessories Set!  Recreate your favorite scenes from Charlie Chaplin's classic film, The Pawnshop with these accessory sets. This set includes the cabinets that hold all the random objects in the Pawn Shop.  Don't miss your chance to add this one-of-a-kind collectible set to your collection today!
